title: Film festival web redesign
body: Redesign of the Reus International Film Festival website, ([previously developed project](https://xarop.com/memorimage-festival/)), maintaining the *backend* and updating the design of the *frontend* to give it a more current image. https://memorimage.reus.cat/ > junglemows.com ![](https://xarop.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/memorimage_full.png) ![](https://xarop.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/memorimage-1-1024x1024.png)
